basic_details.short_information: Cochin University of Science and Technology has released an official recruitment notification for 1 Assistant Professor (Contract basis) vacancy. This contract-based teaching opportunity is open to candidates with a Master’s Degree in Statistics along with NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. Eligible candidates can apply online through the official CUSAT website on or before 19 June 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Statistics with 55% marks (or equivalent), NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D as per UGC regulations

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CUSAT Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: CUSAT Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
